mapper.select: /* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcs - WCS출고주문조회 */ SELECT TIS.OB_SEQ , TIS.CTKEY , TIS.OWKEY , TIS.OBHDKEY , TIS.REQ_TYPE_CD , TIS.OB_NUMBER , TIS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , TIS.CUSTOMER_CODE , TIS.CUSTOMER_NAME , TIS.TRUCK_NUMBER , TIS.SALESPERSON_ID , TIS.SALESPERSON_NAME , TIS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , TIS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , TIS.DOCK_NUMBER , TIS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , TIS.SUCCEEDED , TIS.ERROR_VALUE , TIS.ERROR_REASON , TIS.INSERTDATE , TIS.INSERTURKEY , TIS.UPDATEDATE , TIS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS TIS WHERE TIS.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND TIS.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TIS.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND TIS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND TIS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobicwcs - WCS출고주문상세 조회 */ SELECT TISOBIC.OBIC_SEQ , TISOBIC.OB_SEQ , TISOBIC.OBHDKEY , TISOBIC.OBDTKEY , TISOBIC.OB_NUMBER , TISOBIC.SEQUENCE , TISOBIC.CODE , TISOBIC.QUANTITY_VALUE , TISOBIC.QUANTITY_UNIT , TISOBIC.EFFECTIVE_DATE , TISOBIC.INSERTDATE , TISOBIC.INSERTURKEY , TISOBIC.UPDATEDATE , TISOBIC.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS TIS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS TISOBIC ON TIS.OB_SEQ = TISOBIC.OB_SEQ WHERE TIS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL AND TIS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND (TISOBIC.OBHDKEY, TISOBIC.OBDTKEY) IN
(#{item.obhdkey}, #{item.obdtkey})

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsTest - WCS출고주문 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.DISPATCH_ID , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER = ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER WHERE SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = #{OB_SEQ}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsDtTest - WCS출고주문상세 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBICWCS.OBIC_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBICWCS.OBDTKEY , SOBICWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBICWCS.SEQUENCE , SOBICWCS.CODE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT , SOBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS SOBICWCS WHERE SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ = #{OB_SEQ}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobicwcsTest - WCS출고주문상세 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBICWCS.OBIC_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBICWCS.OBDTKEY , SOBICWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBICWCS.SEQUENCE , SOBICWCS.CODE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT , SOBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS SOBICWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS ON SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ = SOBWCS.OB_SEQ WHERE SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = #{obSeq} AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsUnitTest - WCS출고주문단위 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS WHERE SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = #{OB_SEQ} AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobicwcsUnitTest - WCS출고주문단위상세 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBICWCS.OBIC_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBICWCS.OBDTKEY , SOBICWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBICWCS.SEQUENCE , SOBICWCS.CODE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT , SOBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS SOBICWCS WHERE SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ = #{obSeq}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectOrderPickingList - WCS주문피킹리스트 */ SELECT SOB.CTKEY , SOB.OWKEY , SOB.OBHDKEY , SOB.OBDTKEY , SOB.DISPATCH_ID AS LDLEGID , ROBICWCS.CODE AS ICKEY , ROBICWCS.PICKED_QUANTITY_VALUE * ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS CFQTY , ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER , ROBICWCS.SEQUENCE , ROBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBICWCS ROBICWCS ON ROBWCS.R_OB_SEQ = ROBICWCS.R_OB_SEQ INNER JOIN ( SELECT SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBICWCS.OBDTKEY , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBICWCS.SEQUENCE , SOBICWCS.CODE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT , SOBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE , SOBWCS.DISPATCH_ID FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS SOBICWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ WHERE SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' ) SOB ON SOB.OB_NUMBER = ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER AND SOB.SEQUENCE = ROBICWCS.SEQUENCE AND SOB.EFFECTIVE_DATE = ROBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE AND SOB.OB_SEQ = ROBWCS.OB_SEQ INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC MSTIC ON SOB.CTKEY = MSTIC.CTKEY AND SOB.OWKEY = MSTIC.OWKEY AND SOB.CODE = MSTIC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT ICUT ON MSTIC.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND MSTIC.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND MSTIC.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXTYPE ON ICUT.CTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND ICUT.OWKEY = ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND ICUT.ICUTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND ROBICWCS.PICKED_QUANTITY_UNIT = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE WHERE ROBICWCS.R_OB_SEQ = #{rObSeq} AND ROBICWCS.R_OBIC_SEQ = #{rObicSeq} AND ROBICWCS.SEQUENCE = #{sequence} AND ROBICWCS.CODE = #{code} AND ROBWCS.STATUS = #{status}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectPickingList - WCS피킹리스트 */ SELECT SOB.CTKEY , SOB.OWKEY , SOB.OBHDKEY , SOB.OBDTKEY , ROBUNITPKWCS.CODE AS ICKEY , ROBUNITPKWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE * ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS CFQTY , SOB.OB_NUMBER , SOB.SEQUENCE , ROBUNITWCS.ROLL_NUMBER , ROBUNITWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , ROBUNITPKWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE , SOB.DISPATCH_ID AS LDLEGID FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITWCS ROBUNITWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITPKWCS ROBUNITPKWCS ON ROBUNITWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ = ROBUNITPKWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ INNER JOIN ( SELECT SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBICWCS.OBDTKEY , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBICWCS.SEQUENCE , SOBICWCS.CODE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_VALUE , SOBICWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT , SOBICWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE , SOBWCS.DISPATCH_ID FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_SOBICWCS SOBICWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = SOBICWCS.OB_SEQ WHERE SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'C' ) SOB ON SOB.OB_NUMBER = ROBUNITPKWCS.ORDER_NUMBER AND SOB.SEQUENCE = ROBUNITPKWCS.SEQUENCE AND SOB.EFFECTIVE_DATE = ROBUNITPKWCS.EFFECTIVE_DATE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC MSTIC ON SOB.CTKEY = MSTIC.CTKEY AND SOB.OWKEY = MSTIC.OWKEY AND SOB.CODE = MSTIC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT ICUT ON MSTIC.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND MSTIC.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND MSTIC.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUTXTYPE ON ICUT.CTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND ICUT.OWKEY = ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND ICUT.ICUTKEY = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND ROBUNITPKWCS.QUANTITY_UNIT = ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE WHERE ROBUNITWCS.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND ROBUNITPKWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ = #{rObunitSeq} AND ROBUNITPKWCS.R_OBUNITPK_SEQ = #{rObunitpkSeq} AND ROBUNITPKWCS.ORDER_NUMBER = #{orderNumber} AND ROBUNITPKWCS.SEQUENCE = #{sequence} AND ROBUNITPKWCS.CODE = #{code}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSrmwcsTest - WCS보충지시 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SRMWCS.RM_SEQ , SRMWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SRMWCS.ORDER_TYPE , SRMWCS.HDKEY , SRMWCS.DTKEY , SRMWCS.CTKEY , SRMWCS.OWKEY , SRMWCS.RM_NUMBER , SRMWCS.PRODUCT_CODE , SRMWCS.REPLENISH_QUANTITY_VALUE , SRMWCS.REPLENISH_QUANTITY_UNIT , SRMWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , SRMWCS.DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , SRMWCS.EXPIRATION_DATE , SRMWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SRMWCS.CANCEL_RM_SEQ , SRMWCS.SUCCEEDED , SRMWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SRMWCS.ERROR_REASON , SRMWCS.INSERTDATE , SRMWCS.INSERTURKEY , SRMWCS.UPDATEDATE , SRMWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SRMWCS SRMWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RRMWCS RRMWCS ON SRMWCS.RM_SEQ = RRMWCS.RM_SEQ WHERE SRMWCS.RM_SEQ = #{RM_SEQ} AND RRMWCS.RM_NUMBER IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSrmwcs - WCS보충지시결과 */ SELECT SRMWCS.RM_SEQ , SRMWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SRMWCS.CTKEY , SRMWCS.OWKEY , SRMWCS.ORDER_TYPE , SRMWCS.HDKEY , SRMWCS.DTKEY , SRMWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , SRMWCS.RM_NUMBER AS REQ_NUMBER , RRMWCS.PRODUCT_CODE , RRMWCS.R_RM_SEQ , RRMWCS.STATUS AS IF_STATUS , RRMWCS.STATUS AS IF_STATUS_MSG , RRMWCS.REQUESTED_QUANTITY_VALUE * REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS REQQTY , RRMWCS.DELIVERED_QUANTITY_VALUE * DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS DELIQTY , RRMWCS.REJECTED_QUANTITY_VALUE * REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS REJQTY , RRMWCS.CANCELLED_QUANTITY_VALUE * CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS CANQTY , RRMWCS.ABANDONED_QUANTITY_VALUE * ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTQTY AS ABAQTY , RRMWCS.EXPIRATION_DATE , RRMWCS.DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , RRMWCS.SUCCEEDED , RRMWCS.ERROR_VALUE , RRMWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM (SELECT RM_SEQ , REQ_TYPE_CD , ORDER_TYPE , HDKEY , DTKEY , CTKEY , OWKEY , ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , RM_NUMBER FROM TWORK_INTF_SRMWCS WHERE RM_SEQ = #{rmSeq} AND SUCCEEDED = 'true' ) SRMWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_RRMWCS RRMWCS ON SRMWCS.RM_NUMBER = RRMWCS.RM_NUMBER INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON SRMWCS.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND SRMWCS.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND RRMWCS.PRODUCT_CODE = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RRMWCS.REQUESTED_QUANTITY_UNIT = REQUESTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RRMWCS.DELIVERED_QUANTITY_UNIT = DELIVERED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RRMWCS.REJECTED_QUANTITY_UNIT = REJECTED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RRMWCS.CANCELLED_QUANTITY_UNIT = CANCELLED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE ON IC.CTKEY = ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE.OWKEY AND IC.ICUTKEY = ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTKEY AND RRMWCS.ABANDONED_QUANTITY_UNIT = ABANDONED_ICUTXTYPE.ICUTTYPE WHERE RRMWCS.R_RM_SEQ = #{rRmSeq}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsTestBatch - WCS출고주문 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS ON SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER = ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER WHERE SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL AND ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsUnitTestBatch - WCS출고주문단위 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITWCS ROBUNITWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITPKWCS ROBUNITPKWCS ON ROBUNITWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ = ROBUNITPKWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ WHERE ROBUNITPKWCS.ORDER_NUMBER = SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER ) AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSobwcsUnitTestDelete - WCS출고주문단위 TEST 조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.OUTBOUND_NUMBER , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITWCS ROBUNITWCS INNER JOIN TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITPKWCS ROBUNITPKWCS ON ROBUNITWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ = ROBUNITPKWCS.R_OBUNIT_SEQ WHERE ROBUNITPKWCS.ORDER_NUMBER = SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER ) AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true' AND SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectOrderPickingAbandoned - WCS주문피킹 실패 정보 */ SELECT DISTINCT SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS WHERE SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'C' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS WHERE ROBWCS.R_OB_SEQ = #{rObSeq} AND ROBWCS.STATUS = 'ABANDONED' AND ROBWCS.OB_NUMBER = SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER )

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectDispatchesOrdersDetail - WCS 출고 상세조회 */ SELECT R_OBIC_SEQ , R_OB_SEQ , SEQUENCE , CODE , ORDERED_QUANTITY_VALUE , ORDERED_QUANTITY_UNIT , CANCELLED_QUANTITY_VALUE , CANCELLED_QUANTITY_UNIT , ABANDONED_QUANTITY_VALUE , ABANDONED_QUANTITY_UNIT , PICKED_QUANTITY_VALUE , PICKED_QUANTITY_UNIT , EFFECTIVE_DATE , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBICWCS WHERE R_OB_SEQ = #{R_OB_SEQ}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectDispatchesOrdersUnitDetail - WCS 출고단위 상세조회 */ SELECT R_OBUNITPK_SEQ , R_OBUNIT_SEQ , ORDER_NUMBER , SEQUENCE , CODE , EFFECTIVE_DATE , QUANTITY_VALUE , QUANTITY_UNIT , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBUNITPKWCS WHERE R_OBUNIT_SEQ = #{R_OBUNIT_SEQ}

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectDispatchesOrdersCancel - WCS 출고단위 상세조회 */ SELECT SOBWCS.OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.CTKEY , SOBWCS.OWKEY , SOBWCS.OBHDKEY , SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ , SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DEPARTURE_DATE_TIME , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_CODE , SOBWCS.CUSTOMER_NAME , SOBWCS.TRUCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.SALES_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SOBWCS.DELIVERY_PERSON_NAME , SOBWCS.DOCK_NUMBER , SOBWCS.DISPATCH_ID , SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED , SOBWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SOBWCS.ERROR_REASON , SOBWCS.WCS_INTERFACE_ID , SOBWCS.WMS_INTERFACE_ID , SOBWCS.INSERTDATE , SOBWCS.INSERTURKEY , SOBWCS.UPDATEDATE , SOBWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SOBWCS SOBWCS WHERE SOBWCS.OB_NUMBER = #{OB_NUMBER} AND SOBWCS.CANCEL_OB_SEQ IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INTF_ROBWCS ROBWCS WHERE SOBWCS.OB_SEQ = ROBWCS.OB_SEQ ) AND SOBWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'C' AND SOBWCS.SUCCEEDED = 'true'

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectReplenishmentOrderCancel - WCS 출고단위 취소 */ SELECT RM_SEQ , CTKEY , OWKEY , HDKEY , DTKEY , ORDER_TYPE , REQ_TYPE_CD , CANCEL_RM_SEQ , RM_NUMBER , PRODUCT_CODE , REPLENISH_QUANTITY_VALUE , REPLENISH_QUANTITY_UNIT , ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , EXPIRATION_DATE , LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SUCCEEDED , ERROR_VALUE , ERROR_REASON , WCS_INTERFACE_ID , WMS_INTERFACE_ID , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SRMWCS SRM WHERE SRM.RM_NUMBER = #{RM_NUMBER} AND SRM.CANCEL_RM_SEQ IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INTF_RRMWCS RRM WHERE SRM.RM_SEQ = RRM.RM_SEQ ) AND SRM.REQ_TYPE_CD = 'C' AND SRM.SUCCEEDED = 'true'

/* IfWcsOutBoundMapper.selectIntfSrmwcsList - WCS보충지시 재전송 헤더 조회 */ SELECT SRMWCS.RM_SEQ , SRMWCS.REQ_TYPE_CD , SRMWCS.ORDER_TYPE , SRMWCS.HDKEY , SRMWCS.DTKEY , SRMWCS.CTKEY , SRMWCS.OWKEY , SRMWCS.RM_NUMBER , SRMWCS.PRODUCT_CODE , SRMWCS.REPLENISH_QUANTITY_VALUE , SRMWCS.REPLENISH_QUANTITY_UNIT , SRMWCS.ORIGIN_LOCATION_CODE , SRMWCS.DESTINATION_LOCATION_CODE , SRMWCS.EXPIRATION_DATE , SRMWCS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER , SRMWCS.CANCEL_RM_SEQ , SRMWCS.SUCCEEDED , SRMWCS.ERROR_VALUE , SRMWCS.ERROR_REASON , SRMWCS.INSERTDATE , SRMWCS.INSERTURKEY , SRMWCS.UPDATEDATE , SRMWCS.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INTF_SRMWCS SRMWCS WHERE SRMWCS.RM_SEQ = #{RM_SEQ}
